name: ifl-ios-standards
description: Reusable iOS engineering standards. Ships specialist agents, pattern-neutral brain process-stage skills (brain-design, brain-architect, brain-plan, brain-execute, brain-testing, brain-review, brain-flow), Boardy/VIP task skills, bundled architecture rulebook/specs/process standards, and Bazel module/board scaffolders.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable iOS standards, agents, skills, and scaffolders
interface.longDescription: Brings reusable iOS engineering standards into Codex: pattern-neutral brain process-stage skills (design, architect, plan, execute, testing, review, plus brain-flow end-to-end automation), Boardy/VIP task skills (new module/board, IO interface, communication, service layer, plugin composition, testing, review, refactor, troubleshoot, adopt), specialist agents for delegated delivery, bundled rulebook + specs + process standards (docs-organization, lean-verification), and Bazel module/board scaffolders. Reference paths shown as ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/standards/… resolve relative to this plugin root under Codex.
defaultPrompt: Set up iOS project bindings with the reusable standards
Review this Swift code against the iOS standards
Scaffold a Boardy/VIP module in module X
